text:
The department is composed of an executive director appointed by the board and other employees required to efficiently implement:

(1) this subtitle;

(2) other applicable vehicle laws of this state; and

(3) other laws that grant jurisdiction to or are applicable to the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.003 — Composition of Department

The department is composed of an executive director appointed by the board and other employees required to efficiently implement:

    (1) this subtitle;

    (2) other applicable vehicle laws of this state; and

    (3) other laws that grant jurisdiction to or are applicable to the department.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 1.01, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: The department is composed of an executive director appointed by the board and other employees required to efficiently implement:
other applicable vehicle laws of this state; and
other laws that grant jurisdiction to or are applicable to the department.
